title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMGeological
description: Geological features from OpenStreetMap tagged with geological=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMGeological

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier.

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification.

geologicalType.description: Property. The OSM geological tag classifying the feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:geological'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
